overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage beginning inside a futuristic luxury car with cyan neon interior lighting parked in a shipping container garage. The player drives the car out into a dark industrial tunnel system, exits the vehicle, and proceeds on foot through gravel-lined passages with overhead pipes, eventually entering a larger underground chamber and approaching a metal staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic car interior inside shipping container garage

agents.ego_description: sitting in the driver's seat, panning the camera around the car's interior to examine the dashboard, seats, and neon lighting details

entered.detail: sleek black dashboard with holographic display and cyan accent lighting
luxury white quilted leather passenger seat with diamond pattern stitching
vertical corrugated metal walls of the shipping container garage
glowing cyan LED accent lighting along the car's interior door panels

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a stationary first-person view inside a futuristic vehicle parked within a narrow shipping container garage. The camera slowly pans around the luxurious interior, highlighting the quilted leather seats, holographic dashboard display, and ambient cyan neon lighting, while corrugated metal walls are visible through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: container garage exit leading to industrial tunnel

events.description: car begins moving forward to exit the garage
car exits the container garage into the dark industrial tunnel, perspective shifts to third-person view

agents.ego_description: driving the car out of the container garage, then exiting the vehicle and beginning to walk into the tunnel

entered.detail: dark opening of the industrial tunnel with gravel ground and overhead pipes
rough gravel and dirt surface of the tunnel floor

segments.scene_description: The car accelerates forward and exits the shipping container garage into a dimly lit industrial tunnel. The perspective shifts to an external view showing the sleek black vehicle parked at the garage entrance, surrounded by gravel ground and corrugated metal walls, before the player proceeds on foot into the tunnel system.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underground tunnel with overhead piping

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow tunnel, passing under large industrial pipes and alongside concrete walls

entered.detail: large diameter metal pipes running overhead along the tunnel ceiling
rough concrete and brick walls of the underground passage
red and white striped safety barriers blocking off side passages

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow, dimly lit industrial tunnel characterized by large overhead pipes, rough concrete walls, and a gravel floor. The passage is marked with construction barriers and illuminated by sparse industrial lighting, creating a confined underground atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: large underground chamber with industrial equipment and staircase

events.description: tunnel opens into a larger underground chamber with industrial scaffolding and equipment
approaching and beginning to ascend the metal staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the underground chamber and approaching a metal staircase to ascend

entered.detail: large cavernous space with industrial scaffolding, platforms, and construction materials
steep metal stairs with railings leading upward to a higher level
metal scaffolding structures and industrial machinery along the chamber walls

segments.scene_description: The tunnel opens into a wide underground chamber filled with industrial scaffolding, construction barriers, and machinery. The player walks across a concrete platform toward a metal staircase at the far end, passing green exit signs and safety equipment, before beginning to ascend the stairs into the upper levels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person progression from the intimate, neon-lit interior of a luxury vehicle into a vast, industrial underground complex. It begins with a slow pan across quilted leather seats and a holographic dashboard bathed in cyan light, with corrugated metal walls visible through the windows. As the car accelerates out of the shipping container garage, the perspective shifts to the gravel-lined entrance before the camera proceeds on foot into a dimly lit tunnel system. The scene then narrows into a confined passage of rough concrete and overhead pipes, moving past construction barriers under sparse industrial lighting. Finally, the tunnel opens into a wide underground chamber filled with scaffolding and machinery, leading the camera across a concrete platform toward a metal staircase that ascends into the upper levels.
